refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target to ensure continuous remote control capability.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (link availability) and its operational impact (continuous remote control), emphasizing the criticality of maintaining the communication link.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target using telemetry logs and network monitoring tools.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link health continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Provide real-time status updates to teleoperation control.
FR4: Ensure redundancy or failover mechanisms to maintain link availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust network monitoring and diagnostics subsystem.
DP2: Deploy automatic link failover and recovery protocols.
DP3: Integrate real-time telemetry reporting for link status.
DP4: Design redundant communication paths and hardware.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP2: Deploy automatic link failover and recovery protocols.

potential_sources: Dependency on telemetry data for link status.
Interaction with safety services for alerting on link failure.
coupling_check.notes: DP2 logically couples with telemetry and safety alert functions but maintains modular separation to minimize cross-domain interference.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network infrastructure supports failover mechanisms.
Risk of increased complexity leading to potential new failure modes.
Assumes telemetry data is accurate and timely.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP1 and DP3 in future refinement to enhance monitoring and reporting capabilities.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for managing teleoperation link protocols, failover mechanisms, and real-time link status reporting.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time link status and health metrics to the NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical communication channel managed by Teleoperation for link availability.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts to Safety Services upon link degradation or failure.

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion due to cross-cutting concerns; limited containment of link failover logic.
Minimal containment; vehicle hardware interfaces but does not manage link availability.
Strong containment of link availability functions; low diffusion risk.
Handles alerts but not link management; moderate diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning link availability management to Teleoperation module centralizes responsibility, reduces diffusion, and aligns with functional ownership.
containment_risks: Potential overload of Teleoperation module with complex failover logic.
Interface dependencies on Safety Services and NGHE Solution require robust interface contracts.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor Teleoperation module complexity; consider splitting failover logic if diffusion increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (automatic failover and recovery) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and meets the availability target.

diffusion_risks: Cross-module communication with Safety Services and NGHE Solution may increase interface complexity.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment of DP with minimal diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and failover event logs is feasible within Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Enhance interface definitions between Teleoperation and Safety Services to reduce integration risks.
Plan for scalability of Teleoperation module to handle failover complexity.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of monitoring and reporting sub-functions (FR1 and FR3) and their corresponding DPs is needed to fully cover the availability requirement.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link health continuously.
FR3: Provide real-time status updates to teleoperation control.

revise.why: To incorporate comprehensive monitoring and telemetry reporting functions that complement failover mechanisms.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
open_risks: Complexity of failover logic may impact module maintainability.
Interface dependencies may cause integration challenges.
evidence_needed: Telemetry logs demonstrating link availability performance.
Test results of failover and recovery protocols.
